creator: gvtjongahung@users.sourceforge.net
text:
cd /usr/ports/net/skype && make fetch
===>  Found saved configuration for skype-1.2.0.18_4
=> skype_staticQT-1.2.0.18.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://download.skype.com/linux/.
fetch: http://download.skype.com/linux/skype_staticQT-1.2.0.18.tar.bz2: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/skype_staticQT-1.2.0.18.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/skype.

Fix: 

Store the distfiles somewhere and change the mastersite entry
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/skype && make fetch
